prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5028名→4877名→4425名→3676名→3567名，整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近4年累计前移约1461名 ，2025年基准位次约3567名，表明该校在上海的录取竞争持续加剧；该校在上海市的招生计划2021–2022年均为15人，2023–2024年缩减至10人，2025年进一步缩 减至6人；2026年计划仅4人，较2025年缩招约33%，招生名额持续收紧，对录取位次有下移（更容易进）的拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威 海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属哈尔滨工业大学体系；软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学（本部）2026年位列第12名，威海校区共享本部声誉与学科资源，学 校层次极高；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现 投档线异常信号（中关注），但未对上海产生直接影响；依托哈尔滨工业大学体系，拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机 科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、仪器科学与技术A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为工科试验班（未 来信息），涵盖计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全等当前高热推荐专业（2024年电子信息/通信高热推荐、计算机类推荐）；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较 2025年49276人增长约35%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争压力显著上升；哈尔滨工业大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，非上海本地高 校，但作为C9联盟成员校区的延伸，对上海考生仍具较强跨省吸引力；该校在上海市招生占比极小（2026年仅4人），属于稀缺性招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移 （竞争加剧）、2026年招生计划大幅缩招（33%）、上海市考生总数大幅增长（约35%）、学校层次极高且工科优势突出、招生专业为高热工科方向等因素，缩招效应与考生增长效 应相互对冲。考虑到考生总数增幅（35%）远超缩招幅度（33%），且学校声誉与专业热度均处于高位，预计2026年最低录取位次，预测最低位次约2911名，区间2579–3243名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、自动化、通信工程、电子信息工程、集成电路设计与集成系统、光电信息科学与工程、电气工程及其 自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 暂无其他招生专业（2026年上海市仅开设工科试验班（未来信息）一个专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无（2026年上海市仅一个招生专业，所有考生均需竞争该专业名额）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈尔滨工业大学（威海）在上海市仅招收工科试验班（未来信息）一个专业（计划4人），该专业涵盖计算机、人工智能、电子信息、自动化、电气等当前最热门的工科方 向，学科实力极强。位次在预测区间2579–3243名内的考生可积极冲刺；位次优于区间下限（<2579名）把握较大；位次接近区间上限（>3243名）需谨慎。由于仅有一个专业，不 存在专业分档梯度，建议考生结合自身位次与该校历年录取趋势综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 5028 → 4877 → 4425 → 3676 → 3567, showing a significant upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 1461 places over the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3567, indicating increasing competition for admission to this university in Shanghai. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai was 15 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 10 in 2023–2024, further reduced to 6 in 2025, and only 4 in 2026, a reduction of about 33% compared to 2025. The continuous tightening of enrollment quotas has a downward pull on admission rankings (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with the Harbin Institute of Technology system. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th in 2026. The Weihai campus shares the reputation and disciplinary resources of the main campus, with an extremely high university level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The university ranks 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high attention from applicants. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but it did not directly affect Shanghai. Relying on the Harbin Institute of Technology system, it has 17 A- and above disciplines, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, and Instrument Science and Technology A. Its engineering strength is top in the country, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the enrollment major is Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information), covering currently highly recommended popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Cyberspace Security (in 2024, Electronics/Communication highly recommended, Computer Science recommended). The total number of college entrance exam takers in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure. Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local university in Shanghai, but as an extension of the C9 League member campus, it still has strong cross-provincial appeal to Shanghai candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is extremely small (only 4 in 2026), making it a scarce enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous advancement of historical rankings (increased competition), the significant reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (33%), the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Shanghai (about 35%), the extremely high university level and outstanding engineering advantages, and the enrollment major being a high-heat engineering direction, the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate growth offset each other. Given that the increase in total candidates (35%) far exceeds the reduction in enrollment (33%), and the university's reputation and major popularity are at a high level, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is predicted to be about 2911, with a range of 2579–3243.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and its Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other enrollment majors (only Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) is offered in Shanghai in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None (only one enrollment major in Shanghai in 2026, all candidates must compete for this major's slots).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) only enrolls one major, Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information), in Shanghai (4 slots). This major covers the most popular engineering directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronics, Automation, and Electrical Engineering, with extremely strong disciplinary strength. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 2579–3243 can actively aim; those with rankings better than the lower limit (<2579) have a higher chance; those with rankings near the upper limit (>3243) should be cautious. Since there is only one major, there is no gradient for major tiers. It is recommended that candidates make a comprehensive judgment based on their own rankings and the historical admission trends of this university.
